overview: REJUVE provides personalized hormone replacement therapy through bioidentical hormone pellets and creams, combined with thyroid optimization, vitamin supplementation, and gut health support. Treatment plans are customized based on individual lab results, symptoms, and health goals.
highlights: Weight loss programs with body scans and advanced medications
targetAudience: Individuals with hormonal imbalances seeking personalized treatment for fatigue, weight gain, mood changes, sleep issues, and sexual wellness concerns.
